design_philosophy.visual_style: Modern Enterprise SaaS. Clean lines, soft shadows, rounded corners, high readability. 'Hakim' (AI) adds a layer of friendly intelligence to the rigid admin interface.
design_philosophy.rtl_strategy: CRITICAL: All layouts must be RTL-first. Use logical properties (ps-*, pe-*, ms-*, me-*) instead of physical (pl-*, pr-*, ml-*, mr-*) to ensure bidirectional support.

typography.instructions: Import 'Cairo' and 'Tajawal' from Google Fonts. Apply 'Cairo' to all headings (h1-h6) and 'Tajawal' to body text. Ensure font weights are distinct (Bold for heads, Regular/Medium for body).

primary.name: Nassaq Navy
primary.usage: Main brand color, primary buttons, active states, sidebar backgrounds

secondary.name: Smart Turquoise
secondary.usage: Highlights, success states, positive indicators, secondary actions

layout.grid_system: Use 'Bento' grids for dashboards. 12-column base. Sidebar fixed width (280px) on desktop.
layout.spacing: Generous padding inside cards (p-6 or p-8). Tight gaps in data tables. Use 'gap-6' for dashboard widgets.
layout.radius: rounded-xl (12px) for cards, rounded-lg (8px) for inputs/buttons. Avoid sharp edges.

buttons.primary: bg-brand-navy text-white hover:bg-brand-navy/90 shadow-md rounded-lg h-10 px-6

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.style: h-11 rounded-lg border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-brand-navy focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

navigation.sidebar: bg-brand-navy text-white w-72 fixed inset-y-0 right-0 (for RTL) z-50 flex flex-col
navigation.sidebar_item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium rounded-md transition-colors hover:bg-white/10 data-[active=true]:bg-brand-turquoise data-[active=true]:text-white

landing_page.hero: Use the 'Background Pattern' as a subtle overlay on a Navy gradient. Place 'Hakim' (AI Character) floating or interacting with a UI element. Headline in Cairo Bold.
landing_page.features: Bento grid layout. Use icons + short Arabic text. Hover effects: Card lifts, border glows Turquoise.
landing_page.testimonials: Horizontal scroll or marquee. Use circular avatars.
landing_page.cta: High contrast. Navy background, White text, Turquoise button.

auth_pages.layout: Split screen. Right side (RTL): Form. Left side: Branding + Hakim AI illustration + Testimonial.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar layout (Right aligned for RTL). Top header for search/notifications/profile.
dashboard.widgets: White cards with soft shadow. Headers in Cairo. Data in Tajawal/Numbers in Mono.
dashboard.ai_panel: Floating action button (FAB) or persistent sidebar widget featuring Hakim's face. Clicking opens a chat interface.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text on Navy background is Pure White. Text on Turquoise must be Dark Navy.
accessibility.rtl: Add 'dir=rtl' to the html tag. Use 'text-right' as default alignment for Arabic.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings (ring-2 ring-brand-turquoise) on all interactive elements.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic gradients. Use the provided background pattern.
Dark mode is mandatory. Ensure colors adapt (Navy becomes darker, White becomes Slate-900).
